title: Oral B OB-Shinycln-12pk 12 Pack - Shiny Clean Soft 35
description: Keep your mouth clean and fresh with the Oral-B shiny clean manual toothbrushes. Ergonomically shaped for better handling these tooth brushes help reach even the hardest areas of your mouth. The z-shaped patterned bristles help remove debris and germs from your teeth and mouth. Soft bristles are gentle on your teeth and gums and provide comfort and control when brushing. A built in tongue cleaner helps finish cleaning your whole mouth for a clean finish. When done use the provided toothbrush hygiene cap cover to keep it sanitized and ready to use next time. featuresblue, green, red and purple included Soft 35 bristles that are gentle on your teeth and gumsz-shaped bristles designed to reach in between teeth contoured ergonomic handle for easy us age built in tongue cleaner for total cleanlinesstootbrush hygiene cap cover

reviews.title: Toothbrush
reviews.text: These Oral B toothbrushes were more for travel.  Way to light for everyday use.

reviews.title: Two Stars
reviews.text: Too small.

reviews.title: feels more like the toothbrushes our dentist hands out than we can buy localy
reviews.text: the head is allot softer and feels allot better in the mouth than the oral-b toothbrushes walmart sells for $.97 each those feel like a horse toothbrush these feel more like the toothbrushes our dentist gives out.

reviews.title: Good but for how long
reviews.text: So I use these for trips and then throw them out.  For the cost it's great but never use them long term.

title: grabease Double-Sided Toothbrush for Ages 6 Months to 4 Years, Soft Bristles & Choke Protection Shield, BPA-Free, 1 Pack, Yellow
features: INDEPENDENT TOOTHBRUSHING: Introducing our game-changing toothbrush designed for independent toothbrushing in babies, toddlers, and preschool kids aged 6 months to 4 years! With its two-sided design, this toothbrush encourages a positive approach to oral hygiene. The pack includes one double-sided toothbrush that's perfect for little hands, and a silicone finger brush for gentle gum massage. This toddler toothbrush is ideal for a child's first toothbrush, making dental care fun and easy.

DOUBLE-SIDED TOOTHBRUSH: Our toothbrush is designed to give your child a dazzling smile in no time! The innovative, tapered bristles on both sides of this brush offer maximum contact with teeth - perfect for easily-distracted little ones. Plus, a bonus finger toothbrush is included, ideal for infants, and kids experiencing sensory or sensitivity issues. Ensure your child's dental care starts off strong with our versatile brush set.

SOFT BRISTLES & CHOKE PROTECTION: Our patented design ensures a safe, mess-free tooth cleaning experience for both toddlers and parents. With a built-in choke barrier, the Brush prevents over-insertion and gagging. The soft, flexible bristles are gentle on tender gums and new baby teeth. This versatile toothbrush is a must-have for your baby's first dental care kit - perfect for toddlers, first-time brushers, and those transitioning from finger toothbrushes.

EXPERT APPROVED: Specially designed for infants and toddlers, our patented toothbrush has the seal of approval from top pediatric dentists. With endorsements from the American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry, you can trust that our product is perfect for your child's needs. Remember to replace every 3-4 months for optimal oral hygiene. Shop with confidence, as our brushes ensure a safe, effective start to your baby's dental journey. Order spares or stock up now!

CERTIFIED SAFE: Meticulously lab-tested to meet the most stringent USA safety standards for your baby's wellbeing. Our toothbrushes are 100% BPA, lead, and phthalate-free, ensuring your child's safety as they learn proper oral hygiene. Guide your child with our double-sided toothbrush designed specifically for their needs - from their first tooth to confident self-brushing as a toddler. Create healthy habits under your loving supervision with Grabease.

reviews.title: Not a primary toothbrush
reviews.text: It’s hard-to-impossible to clean the front of my 18 month olds teeth with this. It’s too big. I can use a different brush for that, and then give this to him to “play with” for a few minutes. He makes gagging sounds but it is safe, of course; it’s just much bigger than other baby brushes. I’d save for older toddlers and even then it might be hard for fronts of teeth.

reviews.title: Cheaply made
reviews.text: Liked it but bristles got kind of funky quickly..

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Great baby’s first toothbrush

reviews.title: So far so good.
reviews.text: baby likes this, but i feel that it's a little bit on the shorter side. It does get the job done: cleaning teeth!

reviews.title: like, but its not love
reviews.text:
we've been using this for about a few weeks and it looks like we've had it for a year- its frayed pretty bad :(
**update- we trashed it and bought the cheaper ones. its not worth the price if its only going to last 2 weeks.

title: Kids U-Shaped Toothbrush, Food Grade Soft Silicone Brush Head, U-Type Toothbrush Whole Mouth with Handle for Kids, 360°Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Toddlers and Children, Heart Shape 2-6 Ages
description: Kids U-Shaped Toothbrush, Food Grade Soft Silicone Brush Head, U-Type Toothbrush Whole Mouth Toothbrush with Handle for Kids, 360°Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Toddlers and Children
features: COMFORT AND SAFETY: The easy-grip handle provides comfort and security, making it easier for toddlers to hold their own toothbrushes. Two lovely colors increase your child's interest in brushing and have fun while brushing.
INNOVATIVE U-SHAPED DESIGN: Ergonomic U-shaped brush head that fits the shape and mechanics of children's tooth structure. Specifically designed for children's delicate gums and sensitive teeth.

360° FULL CLEANING: The 360° full cleaning brush head, soft nipple-grade silicone, provides a comfortable brushing feel and cleans your teeth properly without twisting your wrist. Effective deep cleaning without damaging gums and protecting children's enamel.
CUTE DESIGN: This cute U-shaped manual kids toothbrush is designed to make brushing for kids (2-6 years old) more fun and easy. Let your child try it once and he or she will love this toothbrush.
PACKAGE INCLUDES: pink toothbrush*1, blue toothbrush*1, saliva towel*1. After receiving the product, if you have any questions or concerns, please contact us so we can help.

reviews.title: great deal
reviews.text: Really cannot pick because of the price. Item as described and came with a very simple bib. These work as awesome teethers for my twins but in order to make it work for toothbrushing independence, you do need a cooperative toddler who's willing to bite down and keep the teeth between the brushes. If your kids are willing to bite down and brush with these, they work great for encouraging toddlers to maintain healthy dental hygiene. I think it's already awesome for the price and works great as a teether.

title: Oral-B Sensitive Clean Electric Toothbrush Head with Clean & Care Technology, Extra Soft Bristles for Gentle Plaque Removal, Pack of 12, Suitable for Mailbox, White
description: As one of Oral-B’s premium replacement toothbrush heads, the Sensitive Clean features ultrathin bristles that are gentle on gums, combined with regular bristles that are tough on plaque. Sensitive Clean removes up to 100% more plaque and reduces gum inflammation by 100% compared to a manual toothbrush. The unique combination of end rounded and ultrathin bristles make Sensitive Clean ideal for everyone with a sensitive mouth and everyone who is looking for just a great gentle clean. Compatible with all Oral-B handles except Pulsonic & iO.
features: Easy delivery: 12 counts of Oral-B Sensitive Clean toothbrush head in a mailbox compatible and non-printed recyclable packaging
With Clean Maximiser technology, green bristles turn yellow when it is time to replace your brush head
Up to 100 Percent more plaque removal and healthier gums vs. a regular manual toothbrush
Oral-B’s best for whole mouth cleaning (excluding Oral-B iO)
Dentists recommend to change brush head every 3 months for the best clean

reviews.title: If you have sensitive gums, buy this OEM Oral-B Toothbrush Head vs Chinese After-Market
reviews.text: My wife has sensitive gums.  These OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads are much softer but still do the job vs supposedly equivalent "sensitive" Chinese After-Market heads.  While the Chinese after-market toothbrush heads are much cheaper, they contributed to my wife's $2,000. gum surgery.  I swapped back to OEM Oral-B brush heads and all is now good for her.  Live and learn I guess or, better yet, you get what you pay for.  Buy these OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads with confidence.

title: 100 Pack Toothbrush Standard Classic Medium Soft Toothbrush Bulk Individually Wrapped
features: INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED: Each medium soft toothbrush is individually wrapped in a paper casing. Toothbrush Height: 7 Inches. This ensures that the toothbrushes are well protected from germs and bacteria and can be easily redistributed. These manual toothbrushes design with ergonomic shape and grip handle for maximum control while brushing. A great low cost option for everyday use or for those ones and done circumstances.

MEDIUM SOFT BRISTLES: Medium soft toothbrush bristles are made soft to the touch to prevent any damage from being done to the enamel of your teeth when removing plaque. Brush away & feel the difference!

STANDARD SIZE: These medium soft toothbrush are standard sized. They are intended for adults but children can use them as well. Each Pack oral toothbrush comes with a variety of colors so you don’t mistake your brush with your friends or family members. Give your favorite color to your family member or pass this along to a friend when going on adventures.

WHOLESALE TOOTHBRUSHES: There are so many uses for toothbrushes in bulk quantity. Commercially, they can be redistributed in hotels, Airbnb apartments, dental offices, community events, school rooms, to the homeless and the needy, and hygiene drives. They are also great for personal use if you are a frequent traveler, or are in the habit of disposing of your toothbrushes often.

PERFECT TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH: Our disposable manual toothbrushes pack is perfect for traveling, camping, business trips and those on the go. Use them as little or as long as you’d like and toss them out when you’re done! This makes them extremely convenient for everyday use or buy as wholesale toothbrush for donation.

reviews.title: Love buying quality in bulk!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are hard bristle though very sturdy! And such a deal for the price for the amount and quality of the item!! It is hard to separate the toothbrushes by hand, deft need scissors. But aside from that one minor drawback, they're perfect!

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Great value, cute packageing. Great for travel or guests.

reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Thumbs up
reviews.text: Used these as gifts for goodies bags for our women’s conference.

reviews.title: Good AND bad!!
reviews.text: They work but only lasts for like 3 uses, BUT at this price I like a new brush every 3 uses snyway so thats it! If you are looking for a brush that lasts a month (yuck) this aint it but if you want a fresh brush every couple days go for it.

title: ToiletTree Products Pocket Size Travel Sonic Toothbrush
description: Use ToiletTree Products Pocket-Size Travel Sonic Toothbrush, a space-saving dental dynamo to help keep your teeth clean and healthy when you’re away from home. Put yourself on the road to better dental health and keep one at your office, in your car, in your purse, or toss one in your backpack. Now you don’t have to leave your home without a way to keep your mouth and teeth feeling and looking great. You’ll have fresh breath, clean teeth, and a dental routine that will have you bragging to your dentist.
features: This waterproof, easy-to-clean travel pocket-size toothbrush has 18,000 sonic brush strokes per minute to help keep your gums and teeth healthy and bright when you’re away from home

Adults and kids alike love the everyday firm and effective cleaning power of this compact dental tool; take this battery-operated sonic toothbrush anywhere; perfect for travel and everyday use on the go

Small but powerful, store this travel toothbrush with the cap snapped into place to protect the high-quality DuPont bristles; keep it in your pocket, purse, or backpack for a quick brush-up whenever you wish
Powered by 1 AAA battery (not included), this compact toothbrush lasts a long time before changing the battery; use it for 2 minutes each day and it will last more than 120 days, or about 4 months
Gentle but effective brush head keeps your teeth fresh and clean so you can smile with confidence all day long; BPA-free

reviews.title: A bit too soft
reviews.text:
I ordered this to replace the disposable Colgate electric toothbrush I use for travel. The Colgate does not have replaceable batteries and is a bit large for my kit, but prevents me from carrying my Sonicare. I was hopeful this would be a good replacement.

It's not quite there. The size is okay, but the bristles are very soft and the motion is very gentle. You won't hurt yourself with it, but it has nothing on the cheap Colgate or expensive Sonicare. The other problem is that the cap doesn't post onto the base. That wouldn't have been hard for them to do.

It is a gentle electric toothbrush, just too gentle for my needs.

reviews.title: I only use this for spending one night in a ...
reviews.text: I only use this for spending one night in a hotel, it works OK for that but don't expect it to be as vigorous as the much larger Phillips Sonicare.

reviews.title: Very Poor Quality
reviews.text: Had to return for refund, would not vibrate all the time. When it did vibrate you could hardly tell.

reviews.title: Two Stars
reviews.text: Not practical.

reviews.title: Four Stars

reviews.title: Nice mouth feel too
reviews.text: These are sturdy enough to get debris out and still just long enough to work around appliances.  Doesn't hurt my gums, actually, feels good to brush

reviews.title: Works Great On Braces, My Kids Like Them, Brush Cover
reviews.text:
I got this Ortho Standard 33 orthodontic toothbrush almost two months ago and decided to get this value pack. My kids have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, and since using these it’s been better. I don’t notice food stuck or buildup on their brackets.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles or handles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help brush teeth better while having braces.

reviews.title: My Kids Like It, The Brush Head Cover is A Bonus
reviews.text:
I got the Ortho Standard 33 for my kids because they have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, I was hoping these would help due to the design of them.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help better brush teeth while having braces.

reviews.title: It works great
reviews.text: This toothbrush works great to clean around those brackets!

reviews.title: Good design for brushing with braces
reviews.text: I got these for my young adult son who wears braces, and he is very pleased with them. The size of the brush is just right for maneuvering around teeth and braces. The bristles are angled which makes it helpful to thoroughly remove food and tartar for someone with braces. I like that there is a pack of 6, so that there is always a new toothbrush available when the current one needs to be replaced.

title: Initio Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults Rechargeable Toothbrush with Smart Timer 5 Modes 3 Brush Heads 40,000 VPM Motor Whitening Power Toothbrush IT959 (Navy Blue)
features: [5 High-Performance Brushing Modes] Electric toothbrush with 5 modes of intelligence for adults and kids,including White, Clean, Sensitive, Polish, Massage to suit different conditions of teeth of gums. You can choose different modes for your electric toothbrush according to your gum conditions and preferences. Initio sonic electric toothbrush is also a perfect Valentine's Day gift.

[Powerful Sonic Cleaning Effect] This electric toothbrush with the latest sonic technology delivers 40,000 strokes per minute.The sonic technology allows the fluid to gently clean between the teeth and the gum line, the Initio electric toothbrush cleaning effect is 10 times that of manual toothbrushes and 3 times that of ordinary electric toothbrushes. People who smoke or drink tea all the year round can also get brighter teeth by sticking with this electric toothbrush.

[2 Minutes Smart Timer] The electric toothbrush built in smart timer control,pause every 30 seconds to remind the user to change the cleaning area. 2 minutes auto shut off as the brush time recommend by dentist. The rechargeable electric toothbrush can let you get the sweetest smile in the shortest time.

[IPX7 Waterproof and Light Weight Design] Rechargeable electric toothbrush with IPX7 rated waterproof design, so you can safely use the electric toothbrush in the bath or shower. No worry about the water would enter the charge ports to short the battery life. Also,when in use this electric toothbrush, you can feel the comfort and lightness and experience the details of the electric toothbrush design.

[Full Charging for 45 Days Using] This Sonic Electric Toothbrush can run for 45 days after eight hours of charging.The lightweight body design and USB charging interface make this electric toothbrush the best choice for travel-portable and convenient. Great for carrying and traveling. Also one of the best choices as a gift. Please kindly know that the package DO NOT include the AC Adaptor.

reviews.title: Broke after 1yr
reviews.text: I purchased this toothbrush from another seller/company who is no longer selling this product. As you can see, the neck broke after about 1yr of usage.

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush
reviews.text: Very happy with this Sonic electric toothbrush. I like all the different speeds. Very simple and quick to charge and would be easy to travel with and charge. Nice snap cover for the brush making it easier to pack the brush for travel.  Timer mode works great encouraging me not to be in such a hurry brushing my teeth.

reviews.title: Lightweight brush that packs a punch
reviews.text:
What I like:

-lightweight and compact in size
-only one button to cycle through modes and turn it off
-comes with (3) brush heads
-includes USB power cord
-will fit in my toothbrush holder

What I don't like:

-need to buy power adapter to charge it

This isn't a fancy sonic toothbrush. If you're looking for a basic electric toothbrush that's a step above the type you'd buy at the grocery store (that takes two AA batteries - you know the one), this will do it. The toothbrush cleaned my teeth well with a good amount of vibration of the bristles. I'm pretty pleased.

reviews.title: Toothbrush
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:fa007684a8fa5379afdcdb30ceda64f4]] At first I couldn’t get over the vibration, but after using it a couple times I couldn’t get over how polished & white my teeth were! This toothbrush has become top tier in my dental hygiene. 10/10

reviews.title: 5 Different modes
reviews.text: Works really well. It does feel weird since I’m not so used to using an electric toothbrush. Very convenient that it comes with 3 brush heads & usb cable

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I was given one by my oral surgeon and have since used nothing else. Used properly gives you a clean like you just left the hygienist.

reviews.title: My dentist recommends!
reviews.text: This is the toothbrush my dentist recommends. I really, really like it! I'm very glad to have found it here so I can change it out as often as she wants me to.

reviews.title: Love these toothbrushes
reviews.text: Have used them for years!

reviews.title: Nothing special, won't buy again
reviews.text:
I could find nothing particularly special about these. They don't clean my teeth better than any other toothbrush thar I have picked up at the grocery store in the past.
Not worth the price. They aren't angled properly to reach the base of my back teeth. Regret getting these vs something like a "Reach" brand that is angled.

reviews.title: Very soft bristles
reviews.text: I always love the Soft toothbrush my dentist gave me.  They changed it so I had to search for different soft toothbrushes for myself.  Found these and it’s definitely very soft bristles.  Highly recommended.  They give you five in package.

title: Colgate 360 Toothbrush with Tongue Cleaner Soft Full Head (Pack of 8)

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Good price

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: I like them. They aren't soft, which I like, but they also aren't hard. The tongue cleaner is useless, so you should buy a tongue cleaner.

reviews.title: Great toothbrushes!
reviews.text: I buy these in a multipack because I'm bad at replacing my toothbrushes if I have to buy them every time. Great toothbrushes. Bristles are medium firm and the circular silicon parts are very good for giving you a clean feeling. The back of head of the toothbrush is textured to use against your tongue, even though I usually don't use it that way.

reviews.title: Great Product at a Great Price
reviews.text: I have always felt that this is the greatest toothbrush ever made, and they have unfortunately become very difficult to find at my local stores.  I have never seen these value packs at any store.  This is the only way to go.  These brushes have wide, soft heads.  The handle is very ergonomically designed and fits very nicely in your hand.  Just buy them.  You won't regret it.

reviews.title: Bad design.
reviews.text:
The tongue clean is extremely irritating when you brush your teeth. Tried to peel it off and couldn't. Threw it away.
Tongue cleaning should be done with another device.

reviews.title: Five Stars if it suits your needs.
reviews.text:
First of all, the base color was supposed to be black and it is what they call black, but it’s kind of a copper a metallic black not a true black.
The design is compact and it works very well.
I even like the little cord holder that comes with it as it’s very ergonomically designed.
The unit works just fine for my sonicare by Phillips.
I happen to have the one with a glass. After using this a couple of days I realized I like the look of the glass better than I like this.
On the other hand, if you have a very small space in which to put it on your sink, you may prefer something with a smaller silhouette; the footprint is the same, but it’s just not as big a presence because you don’t have the height and width of the glass.

reviews.title: Just as original
reviews.text: I got this to replace mu original charger for electric toothbrush, it looks just like it and so far, it has been working as the original, would recommend.

reviews.title: Great replacement or spare charger for Sonicare
reviews.text:
I really like my Sonic Care toothbrush and take it anywhere. So getting a second charger was a no-brainer.
I chose the gold colored base and it really looks nice.

It works just like the original and comes with the clear plastic holder, but you can also use the glass cup on it if you like. The cable is nice and long and I like that it comes in black, which fits better with some décor. I think there are some choices in regard to color of the base and cable.

Nothing bad to say about them.
perfect for travel or if you have a second home and don't want to constantly take the charger with you; and of course as a replacement.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

Keep in mind, it has no fluoride so if you need fluoride like I do, I mix this with crest for a bright shiny smile.

reviews.title: More like the impossible-to-find-Fairywill
reviews.text: This replaces a previously-ordered wireless-charging brush.  Reason for this is that it's lighter, takes a common brushhead (and we have the soft-bristle heads from previously).  Has a plug-in charger, i.e. not wireless, so that works, easy to travel with, don't have to take an induction charger with us. Also, the 30-second indicator is easy to hear/feel.
